title: PDF - evidence-faithful reading report

follow_up_answers.answer: Use the detailed length. Preserve inspectable evidence without padding the report.
Treat the verified export value of 78 percent as authoritative. Keep a visible note that the 81 percent summary value was obsolete and corrected; do not hide the discrepancy.
Choose the visual direction. Optimize for independent reading, evidence inspection, and steering-committee credibility.
There is no conversion action or contact channel. The only next decision is the two-week pilot continuation described in the source.

summary_confirmation_reply: The Material Understanding Summary is accurate, including the unresolved 81 versus 78 percent discrepancy.
confirmation_reply: The current Report Design Brief is confirmed. Use 78 percent as authoritative and keep the correction visible. Please proceed.
forbidden_behaviors: Skip complete source inspection or the Material Understanding Summary confirmation gate.
Silently choose 81 or 78 percent before the user resolves the contradiction.
Omit a core metric, the rollout boundary, or the visible correction note.
Invent a public claim, price, contact channel, action link, or sales CTA.
Depend on remote visual, font, script, or stylesheet assets.

forbidden_text: the pilot is ready for citywide rollout
